query_normalized: collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-policy distillation computer science
rationale: This paper qualifies under rule (a) as same-mechanism evidence: both the user's question and the candidate paper measure knowledge distillation as the core algorithmic mechanism, even though the candidate paper uses triplet loss methodology rather than multi-teacher on-policy distillation with LoRA. For a literature review, this would serve as relevant background on distillation techniques that the user's work builds upon.
